description: Polar Terror rally, 2026-07-03 08:42:43 (WOS_BattleReports_T12PolarTerror.pdf). Lv8 Abyssal Shelldragon - rally-only beast type. Marlinman = rally captain with NO heroes set (all three slots Vacant) and only 3 troops sent; 8 alliance joiners carry the army (incl. T12 troops). VICTORY. Structure/demo report, NOT calibration-grade (joiner stat panels unknown).

beast.name: Lv8 Abyssal Shelldragon
beast.power_per_unit_check: 49,500,000/750,000 = 66.0 = EXACT tier-10 power - tier mapping holds for Polar Terrors; bonus ladder differs from field beasts (+660% at Lv8)

rally.composition_note: Displayed tier levels are FRACTIONAL (11.5/11.3/11.4) - rally panel shows the troop-count-weighted average tier of the mixed T11+T12 army, same interpolation convention as beast units.

Indomitable Wall.text: Reduces enemy damage inflicted by 2.4% for 5 turns from the start of battle
Indomitable Wall.activation: TOTAL level summed across rally members (8-member cap per wostools)

Meridian Phalanx.text: Reduces Infantry damage taken by 2% and increases Marksman damage by 2% for 5 turns from the start of battle

Starfire.text: Increases Marksman damage dealt every 5 turns by 2% from the start of battle

observations: Skill panel shows captain's three hero slots (all Vacant) + troop skills + T12 skill totals. Joiner flag-hero skills still invisible as in PvP.
T12 skills display as 'Total <skill> Level: N' with the summed effect in the tooltip - additive total-level stacking CONFIRMED in-game.

Stat Bonuses panel shown = captain's own (Marlinman's, incl. his still-active buffs at +17/+6/+6) even though he sent 3 troops - the panel is per-viewer, NOT rally-aggregated. Rally stat aggregation remains an open question -> controlled farm rallies wanted.
Widgets confirmed inert for Polar Terrors (Martin) - neither rally nor garrison context.
Beast group kills columns: 3/18/24 severe of 45 injured total; severe share ~0.25% matches beast bookkeeping.
Polar Terror bonus at Lv8 is +660% - a separate, much steeper ladder than field beasts (+5.3% at Lv8).
